title: A dimensionally exact isometric cube: the compiled Precept definition as a material object. One block, one definition, completely self-contained. The same solid gives the same measurements from any angle — like Precept's determinism: same definition plus same data always equals the same outcome.
conceptualBridge: The isometric block means determinism because one compiled contract stays self-consistent from every angle and yields the same result each time.
decision: Shortlisted for making determinism and one-definition completeness feel material and exact.
